title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: The video chronicles Kalshi's path from founding to a $22 billion valuation, highlighting the founders Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara's regulatory battles to build a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets. It frames their journey as a story of conviction, legitimacy-building through regulatory approval, and rapid scaling success after breaking through legal barriers.
